w.name: Educational — 5 Signs Your Home Needs Repainting

bg.query: peeling paint old wall worn faded house exterior close up
bg.usage: Atmospheric background on tip slides at 0.10 opacity

slides.headline:
5 SIGNS YOUR
HOME IS BEGGING
FOR A FRESH
COAT.
slides.sub: Swipe before it's too late (or too expensive) →

slides.sign: Fading, chalking, or chalky residue on exterior
slides.detail: UV radiation breaks down paint binders over 5–8 years, leaving a chalky film that means your home is no longer protected against moisture damage.
Peeling paint means moisture is getting between paint and surface. Left unchecked, this causes wood rot, mould, and structural damage that costs far more to repair than a repaint.

slides.sign: Visible staining, water marks, or discolouration
slides.detail: Dark water stains, rust marks, or mineral bleeds are signs that paint has failed as a barrier. Covering without treating the source makes it worse — call a professional.
Most exterior paint lasts 7–10 years. Interior paint 5–7 years. After that, you're one bad season away from expensive remediation. Preventive repainting is always the cheaper option.

slides.sign: You're about to sell the property
slides.detail: Fresh exterior paint is the #1 ROI home improvement before sale. It adds perceived value that consistently exceeds the cost of the paint job at resale.

slides.headline:
SPOTTED ANY
OF THESE?
slides.sub: Free colour consultation. No obligation. No pressure.

slides.headline:
5 THINGS
MAKING YOUR
HOME A PEST
MAGNET.
slides.sub: Fix these today before they become an infestation →

slides.tip: Standing water anywhere on your property
slides.detail: Mosquitoes breed in standing water as shallow as a bottle cap. Birdbaths, gutters, plant saucers, and low yard areas are all high-risk. Drain and remove weekly.

slides.tip: Gaps under doors and around utility penetrations
slides.detail: A mouse can enter through a gap the width of a pencil. Check all exterior doors, pipes, vents, and utility penetrations. Seal with steel wool + caulk.

slides.tip: Uncovered garbage bins and compost near the house
slides.detail: Food waste within 10 metres of your home is a 24-hour buffet for rodents, raccoons, and insects. Use sealed bins and keep compost away from the structure.
Termites, carpenter ants, and rodents love stacked firewood. Keep piles elevated and at least 5 metres from any structure.

slides.tip: Overgrown shrubs and mulch touching the foundation
slides.detail: Dense vegetation and moisture-retaining mulch against your foundation is a highway for ants, termites, and other pests to enter your walls.

caption.hook: 🏠 5 things making your home a pest magnet right now — and how to fix them today.
caption.body: After {{years_in_business}} years of pest control across {{city}}, our team at {{business_name}} sees the same entry points and attractants in virtually every home we visit. Fix these and you eliminate 80% of your pest risk — for free.
caption.cta: 📌 Save this post and share it with every homeowner you know. Questions? Drop them below and we'll answer! And if you want a professional check — call {{business_phone}}. 👇

slides.headline:
YOUR CAR IS
TRYING TO
TELL YOU
SOMETHING.
slides.sub: 5 warning signs drivers ignore until it's too expensive →

slides.sign: Grinding, squealing, or metal-on-metal braking sounds
slides.detail: Brake noises mean your pads or rotors are failing. This is a direct safety issue — the longer you wait, the more expensive and dangerous it becomes.

slides.sign: Check Engine Light — even if the car seems fine
slides.detail: Modern ECUs detect hundreds of fault codes. 'Seems fine' means nothing — a small misfire today becomes a catalytic converter at $2,000+ next month.

slides.sign: Temperature gauge creeping higher than normal
slides.detail: Overheating is one of the most destructive things that can happen to an engine. If your temp gauge is climbing — stop driving and call immediately.

slides.sign: Any fluid spots on your driveway
slides.detail: Oil, coolant, transmission fluid, or brake fluid leaks all mean something is failing. The spot is getting bigger whether you watch it or not.

slides.sign: Vibration, shimmy, or pulling when driving straight
slides.detail: Vibration usually means tyre, wheel balance, or suspension issues. Pulling to one side often means brake or alignment problems — both affect stopping distance.

slides.headline:
RECOGNISE
ANY OF
THESE?
slides.sub: Free diagnostic check. Honest quote. No pressure.

caption.hook: 🚗 Your car is talking. Here's how to understand what it's saying before it costs you a fortune.
caption.body: After {{years_in_business}} years as mechanics in {{city}}, our team at {{business_name}} has seen the same warning signs right before expensive repairs. Swipe through — this could save your car (and your wallet).

radius.name: Educational — 5 Signs You Need the Dentist Now
radius.headline:
5 SIGNS
YOUR MOUTH
IS TELLING
YOU SOMETHING.
radius.sub: Don't wait until it costs twice as much →
radius.sign: Your gums bleed when you brush
radius.detail: Occasional bleeding is NOT normal. It's the earliest sign of gum disease — the #1 cause of adult tooth loss. Caught early, it's easily treated. Ignored, it becomes expensive and irreversible.
radius.sign: Sensitivity to hot, cold, or sweet foods
radius.detail: Sensitivity means your enamel is compromised or a nerve is exposed. This is your tooth warning you before it becomes a root canal situation.
radius.sign: A tooth that's been aching — even mildly
radius.detail: Tooth pain doesn't go away on its own. An ache that comes and goes often indicates infection building. Dental infections can spread dangerously if left untreated.
radius.sign: You can visibly see a crack, chip, or dark spot
radius.detail: Any structural damage or visible discolouration needs a professional assessment. What looks like a minor chip can hide a much bigger problem beneath the surface.
radius.sign: You haven't had a check-up in over 12 months
radius.detail: Most dental problems are invisible to the untrained eye until they become painful and expensive. A bi-annual check-up is the cheapest dental insurance you can have.
radius.headline:
SPOTTED
ANY OF
THESE?
radius.sub: Book before a small problem becomes a big one.
radius.hook: 🦷 Your mouth has been trying to tell you something. Here are 5 signs you shouldn't ignore.
radius.body: Dental problems caught early are always cheaper, less painful, and less invasive to treat. Our team at {{business_name}} sees patients across {{city}} who waited — and the outcome is always the same: it cost more than if they'd come in sooner.
radius.cta: 📌 Save this and share it with every adult you care about. Drop 'BOOK' in the comments and we'll DM you our next available appointment. Or call {{business_phone}}. 👇
